content:
<doctag><picture><loc_60><loc_48><loc_176><loc_70></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_68><loc_73><loc_444><loc_96>Arm ® Cortex ® -M4 32b MCU+FPU, 125 DMIPS, 512KB Flash, 128KB RAM, USB OTG FS, 11 TIMs, 1 ADC, 13 comm. interfaces</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_343><loc_99><loc_444><loc_106>Datasheet - production data</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_56><loc_109><loc_110><loc_120>Features</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_56><loc_124><loc_208><loc_139>· Includes ST state-of-the-art patented technology</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_139><loc_218><loc_155>· Dynamic efficiency line with BAM (Batch acquisition mode)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_155><loc_183><loc_163>-1.7 V to 3.6 V power supply</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_162><loc_242><loc_170>-40°C to 85/105/125 °C temperature range</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_169><loc_242><loc_176>-4.0°C to 85/105/125 °C temperature range</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_176><loc_242><loc_204>· Core: Arm ® 32-bit Cortex ® -M4 CPU with FPU, adaptive real-time accelerator (ART Accelerator) allowing 0-wait state execution from flash memory, frequency up to 100 MHz, memory protection unit,</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_204><loc_242><loc_218>125 DMIPS/1.25 DMIPS/MHz (Dhrystone 2.1), and DSP instructions</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_219><loc_105><loc_227>· Memories</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_227><loc_242><loc_243>-Up to 512 Kbytes of flash memory -128 Kbytes of SRAM</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_243><loc_242><loc_251>-Clock, reset, and supply management</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_250><loc_235><loc_258>-1.7 V to 3.6 V application supply and I/Os</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_257><loc_242><loc_265>-POR, PDR, PVD, and BOR</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_264><loc_189><loc_272>-4-to-26 MHz crystal oscillator</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_271><loc_214><loc_279>-Internal 16 MHz factory-trimmed RC</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_278><loc_232><loc_286>-32 kHz oscillator for RTC with calibration</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_285><loc_242><loc_293>-Internal 32 kHz RC with calibration</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_293><loc_115><loc_301>· Power consumption</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_301><loc_204><loc_309>-Run: 100 µA/MHz (peripheral off)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_308><loc_240><loc_328>-Stop (Flash in Stop mode, fast wakeup time): 42 µA typical at 25 °C; 65 µA max at 25 °C</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_327><loc_240><loc_348>-Stop (Flash in Deep power down mode, slow wakeup time): down to 9 µA at 25 °C; 28 µA max at 25 °C</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_347><loc_229><loc_361>-Standby: 1.8 µA at 25 °C / 1.7 V without RTC; 11 µA at 85 °C at 1.7 V</list_item>
<list_item><loc_67><loc_360><loc_212><loc_368>-V BAT supply for RTC: 1 µA at 25 °C</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_368><loc_232><loc_383>· 1×12-bit, 2.4 MSPS A/D converter: up to 16 channels</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc_383><loc_218><loc_398>· General-purpose DMA: 16-stream DMA controllers with FIFOs and burst support</list_item>
<list_item><loc_56><loc
